languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, счастлив доложить, что {d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}"Бессердечный"{/d} готов пополнить вашу флотилию! Корабль немедленно отправится сопровождать ваш флагман".

traits.locale_text: "Ваша Светлость, счастлив доложить, что {d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}"Бессердечный"{/d} готов пополнить вашу флотилию! Корабль немедленно отправится сопровождать ваш флагман".

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am pleased to inform you that the {d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}Heartless{/d} is now ready to join your flotilla! The vessel will be deployed immediately to escort your flagship."

languages.text: 「陛下、{d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}ハートレス{/d}が艦隊に加わる準備が整ったことをご報告いたします！この船はただちに、旗艦の護衛任務に就かせます」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am pleased to inform you that the {d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}Heartless{/d} is now ready to join your flotilla! The vessel will be deployed immediately to escort your flagship."

traits.locale_text: 「陛下、{d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}ハートレス{/d}が艦隊に加わる準備が整ったことをご報告いたします！この船はただちに、旗艦の護衛任務に就かせます」

languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}Taşkalp{/d}'in artık Filotilla'nıza katılmaya hazır olduğunu iletmekten memnuniyet duyarım {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Gemi, derhâl sancak geminize eşlik etmek üzere konuşlandırılacaktır."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am pleased to inform you that the {d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}Heartless{/d} is now ready to join your flotilla! The vessel will be deployed immediately to escort your flagship."

traits.locale_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}Taşkalp{/d}'in artık Filotilla'nıza katılmaya hazır olduğunu iletmekten memnuniyet duyarım {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Gemi, derhâl sancak geminize eşlik etmek üzere konuşlandırılacaktır."

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, ¡me alegro de poder informarle de que la {d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}Desalmada{/d} está lista para unirse a su flotilla! Desplegaremos la nave inmediatamente como escolta para su nave insignia».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am pleased to inform you that the {d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}Heartless{/d} is now ready to join your flotilla! The vessel will be deployed immediately to escort your flagship."

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, ¡me alegro de poder informarle de que la {d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}Desalmada{/d} está lista para unirse a su flotilla! Desplegaremos la nave inmediatamente como escolta para su nave insignia».

languages.text: “大人，我怀着无比喜悦的心情通知您，{d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}无心号{/d}已经准备好加入您的舰队了！我们会立刻委派这艘船护卫您的旗舰。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am pleased to inform you that the {d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}Heartless{/d} is now ready to join your flotilla! The vessel will be deployed immediately to escort your flagship."

traits.locale_text: “大人，我怀着无比喜悦的心情通知您，{d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}无心号{/d}已经准备好加入您的舰队了！我们会立刻委派这艘船护卫您的旗舰。”

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, j'ai l'honneur de vous informer que le {d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}Sans-Cœur{/d} est prêt à rejoindre votre flottille ! Il va être immédiatement déployé afin d'escorter votre vaisseau amiral. »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am pleased to inform you that the {d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}Heartless{/d} is now ready to join your flotilla! The vessel will be deployed immediately to escort your flagship."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, j'ai l'honneur de vous informer que le {d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}Sans-Cœur{/d} est prêt à rejoindre votre flottille ! Il va être immédiatement déployé afin d'escorter votre vaisseau amiral. »

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich freue mich, Euch mitteilen zu können, dass die {d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}Heartless{/d} nun bereit ist, sich Eurer Flotte anzuschließen! Sie wird Euer Flaggschiff ab sofort eskortieren."
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am pleased to inform you that the {d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}Heartless{/d} is now ready to join your flotilla! The vessel will be deployed immediately to escort your flagship."

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich freue mich, Euch mitteilen zu können, dass die {d|Encyclopedia:BS_Heartless}Heartless{/d} nun bereit ist, sich Eurer Flotte anzuschließen! Sie wird Euer Flaggschiff ab sofort eskortieren."
